---
id: delete-stream
title: "DeleteASRStream"
description: "Delete an ASR recognition stream."
api: 
info_path: extended_services/cloud-realtime-asr/en/server/api-reference/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>DeleteASRStream</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


Delete an ASR recognition stream.
## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> API prototype parameter\n>\n> https://cloud-realtime-asr-api.zegotech.cn?Action=DeleteASRStream\n","required":true,"allowEmptyValue":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["DeleteASRStream"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Application ID, assigned by ZEGOCLOUD. Get it from the [ZEGOCLOUD Admin Console](https://console.zegocloud.com/).","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. 16-bit hexadecimal random string (hex encoding of 8 bytes of random number). For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Current Unix timestamp, in seconds. For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>, maximum allowed deviation of 10 minutes.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Signature version number.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Signature, used to verify the legitimacy of the request. Please refer to [Signature Mechanism](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism) to generate.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>

The backend only processes the request with the latest Sequence. Operations on the same instance must guarantee an increasing sequence number. For example: \"Sequence\": 1.\nIf empty, the backend reception time is used.\n"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
